children.text: to receive and combine program allocations of covered housing assistance; and

children.label: A
children.text: provide incentives to low-income families with children whose head of the household is employed, seeking employment, or preparing for employment by participating in a job training or educational program, or any program that otherwise assists individuals in obtaining employment and attaining economic self-sufficiency;

children.label: B
children.text: reduce costs of Federal housing assistance and achieve greater cost-effectiveness in Federal housing assistance expenditures;

children.label: C
children.text: increase the stock of affordable housing and housing choices for low-income families;

children.label: E
children.text: reduce geographic concentration of assisted families;

children.label: F
children.text: reduce homelessness through providing permanent housing solutions;

children.label: H
children.text: achieve such other purposes with respect to low-income families, as determined by the participating local governments and municipalities in coordination with the public housing agencies;1So in original. The semicolon probably should be a period.1
